---
title: "debug_fishtest.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/tools/debug/debug_fishtest.py"
loc: 45
complexity: 7
logic_score: 2.88
style_score: 3.81
intel_score: 6.73
overall_score: 4.93
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating FishtestLegacyDiagnostic, execute.

## Interaction Protocol
Import FishtestLegacyDiagnostic and call its primary methods.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 2.9/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 6.7/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 18 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [json](file://json)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [src.core.engine.vector](file://src.core.engine.vector)

### Exports
- `FishtestLegacyDiagnostic`
- `execute`
